mapper.insert:
SELECT SCOTT.seq_media_files.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO SCOTT.media_files( file_id, account_id, ref_type, ref_id, url, created_at ) VALUES ( #{fileId}, #{accountId}, #{refType}, #{refId}, #{url}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT file_id, account_id, ref_type, ref_id, url, created_at FROM SCOTT.media_files WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND ref_type = #{refType} AND ref_id = #{refId}
SELECT file_id, account_id, ref_type, ref_id, url, created_at FROM SCOTT.media_files WHERE ref_type = #{refType} AND ref_id = #{refId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT file_id AS fileId, account_id AS accountId, ref_type AS refType, ref_id AS refId, url AS url, created_at AS createdAt FROM SCOTT.media_files WHERE file_id = #{mediaId}

SELECT file_id, account_id, ref_type, ref_id, url, created_at FROM SCOTT.media_files WHERE file_id IN
#{id}
